sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_throwIf (number Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT throwIf(number = 3, 'Three is not allowed') FROM test_throwIf;
SELECT throwIf(number > 4, 'Number exceeds limit', 1001) FROM test_throwIf;
SELECT number FROM test_throwIf WHERE throwIf(number < 2, 'Value too low') RETURNING number;
